topic: Devin 2.2 Review: AI Software Engineer Gets 3x Faster, Adds PR Review Mode

competitors.title: Devin 2.2 Review 2026: What's New in Autonomous Coding
key_points: Devin 2.2 launched March 2026 with 3x faster task completion
Added dedicated PR Review Mode for automated code review workflows
Enhanced sandbox environment with better debugging tools
Improved context window handling for larger codebases
New pricing model: $20/month base + $2.25 per ACU (Agent Compute Unit)
Retains cloud-based execution model with web interface
Targeting enterprise backlog management and code review automation
Integrations with GitHub, GitLab, Jira expanded

competitors.title: Devin 2 Review: Autonomous Engineering at Scale
key_points: Comparison to Devin 1.0: 3x performance improvement on SWE-bench tasks
PR Review Mode can review 50+ PRs per hour vs human average of 5-10
Reduced context switching for developers by handling routine reviews
Enhanced security scanning integrated into PR review workflow
Better handling of legacy code and complex refactoring tasks
Team collaboration features for multi-reviewer workflows
Enterprise-grade compliance and audit trail capabilities

competitors.title: Devin 2.2: AI Software Engineer Evolution 2026
key_points: Historical context: Devin 1.0 launched 2024 with 13.86% SWE-bench score
Devin 2.0 (2025) improved to 45% on SWE-bench with added debugging
Devin 2.2 (2026) claims 72% on SWE-bench, approaching Claude Code levels
Shift from pure autonomy to collaborative autonomy model
PR Review Mode addresses code quality gaps in earlier versions
Integration with existing CI/CD pipelines for seamless adoption
Focus on reducing developer cognitive load for mundane tasks

stats.fact: Devin 2.2 achieves 3x faster task completion compared to Devin 1.0
PR Review Mode can process 50+ pull requests per hour versus human average of 5-10
Devin pricing dropped from $500/month to $20 core + $2.25 per ACU
Devin reports 67% PR merge rate on defined tasks
stats.source: Cognition AI / MorphLLM AI Coding Agents Report 2026

stats.fact: Windsurf acquired by Cognition (Devin AI) in July 2025 for $250M
AI code assistant market size reaches $6B in 2026 with 22% CAGR
GitHub Copilot has 1.3 million paid subscribers as of 2026
75% of enterprises will adopt AI code assistants by 2028
